purpose: Prevent duplicate Day AI Organizations before account intake writes.

nameRules: strip common suffixes such as inc, ltd, llc, plc, corp, corporation, group, company only for comparison

evidenceInputs: Day AI People email domains and linked account context
Freshsales sales account IDs and domains
Freshsales deals, activities, conversations, and notes
public website redirects and official source URLs

exactCanonicalDomain.receipt: Matched existing Day AI Organization by canonical domain.

knownSourceId.receipt: Matched existing Day AI Organization by stored source ID.

clearTypoOrNameVariant.receipt: Matched existing Day AI Organization by strong variant evidence.

parentSubsidiary.receipt: Parent/subsidiary scope needs AM decision before Organization write.

ambiguous.receipt: Blocked Organization creation because multiple plausible matches exist.

noCredibleMatch.receipt: No credible existing Organization match found.

idempotency.organizationKey: canonical_domain when present, otherwise normalized account name plus owner email plus created date
idempotency.writeBehavior: retry updates the same pending or matched Day AI record; never create a second Organization for the same idempotency key

receiptRequirements: Show whether Codex is matching an existing Organization, asking for parent/subsidiary decision, blocking for review, or creating a new Organization.
Show the top candidate matches with evidence and confidence.
Show which Day AI fields will be written.
If blocked, show the review task/context that will be created instead of an Organization.
